creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry, the error was mine.  I thought I had already said that, but I see I did not.

I added some patches to pkg-plist based on the results of make check-orphans

At present, it builds everywhere but 10.x i386.

https://redports.org/~dvl/20140907211617-66268-241798/.txz.log
